title: Good: Mutex lock ordering documented to prevent deadlock
description:
In lichen_l2_enable() (lichen_l2.c:198-210), the cleanup path acquires tx_mutex then rx_mutex, with explicit comment explaining the lock order prevents deadlock. This is defensive programming done right -- the invariant is documented where it's enforced.

Worth preserving if someone refactors the locking.

Location: firmware/bridge-zephyr/subsys/lichen/lichen_l2.c:198-210
